---
title: "Contact"
description: "Independent case management and rehabilitation coordination services across Northern Ireland."
---

# Contact

For referrals, professional enquiries, or general questions, please get in touch.

::: {.service-card}
### Email

[info@casemanagementni.co.uk](mailto:info@casemanagementni.co.uk)

### Telephone

07800 000000
:::

::: {.highlight-box}
Please do not send confidential personal or medical information by email unless this has been agreed in advance.
:::
